common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

landing.guide: Welcome to BRESO. A calm space to care for yourself.

onboarding.title: Onboarding
onboarding.guide: We’ll ask you a few questions to get to know you better.
onboarding.step1Prompt: Hi, I’m BRESO 🌱 What’s your name?
onboarding.step2Prompt: Nice to meet you, {{name}}. What language would you like us to use?
onboarding.step3Prompt: Is there someone you trust that you’d like to add to support you? (you can skip this)
onboarding.name: Name
onboarding.ageCheck: Soy mayor de 18 años / I am over 18

chat.guide: This is your safe space. Tell me how you’re feeling today.
chat.welcome: Hi {{name}}. I’m BRESO 🌱 Ready to begin?

firstQuestion.motivation: What small step would help you today?
firstQuestion.proposal: Pick a proposal for today. Which one would you like to try?
firstQuestion.celebration: What was the best part of your day to celebrate?

chat.errorReply: Could not send your check-in. Please try again.

mockMessages.text: Hi Ana. I’m here to listen to you with calm.
Thanks. Today I feel a bit anxious.
We can start with a short breathing exercise. Ready?

mockReplies.listening: Let’s breathe together: inhale 4 seconds, exhale 6. How does your body feel right now?
mockReplies.motivation: Choose a small step for today. What’s the next action that feels doable?
mockReplies.proposal: Perfect. Go for a 15-minute walk today and note how you felt.
mockReplies.celebration: Great job! Celebrating is also self-care. What was the best part of your day?

dashboard.error: Could not load the dashboard. Please try again.
dashboard.guide: Here you can see your progress and how you’re growing.
dashboard.streak: {{days}} days in a row / {{days}} días consecutivos 🔥
dashboard.startToday: Iniciar check-in del día (5 minutos) / Start today's check-in (5 minutes)
